arts.ttl: Inter set their sights on Empoli
arts.sum: There haven’t been any draws in 16 matches at the Meazza stadium between Inter and Empoli in Serie A (14 wins for the Lombards against the two for the Tuscans); only against Lecce (19) have the Nerazzurri played more home games without ever drawing in the competition. Inter have won 13 of their last 14 league matches against Empoli, scoring 29 goals in the process (2.1 per game on average) – the only win for the Tuscans in this period was back on 23 January 2023 (1-0 at the Meazza stadium with Tommaso Baldanzi’s goal).

arts.ttl: Cassano Inter Critique: “Inzaghi Hysterical on Wednesday, Has a Ferrari but Struggles to Innovate”
arts.sum: Former Inter Milan striker Antonio Cassano has delivered a scathing assessment of the Nerazzurri's recent performance, particularly targeting manager Simone Inzaghi following the team's draw against Bologna in their Serie A catch-up match. arts.ttl: Serie A | Inter v Empoli: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the Serie A season progresses, Inter Milan are set to face Empoli this Sunday at the iconic San Siro stadium. After a disappointing draw against Bologna in their last outing, the reigning champions are eager to return to winning ways and close the gap on league leaders Napoli. The post Serie A | Inter v Empoli: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Damien Duff ‘on a bit of a GAA buzz at the minute’ as inter-county stars flock to Shelbourne
arts.sum: Boyd has never played overseas, yet having spoken about the prospect with his partner, his gut feeling was that he couldn’t walk away from the Duff show. “I feel like if anyone has to leave anyone, it’s the manager [who] has to leave me,” says Boyd, who has been open about his colourful relationship with his boss.

arts.ttl: Inter Earmark Two Serie A Defenders to Replace Francesco Acerbi
arts.sum: Serie A champions Inter have compiled a two-man shortlist to replace long-term absentee Francesco Acerbi this winter. According to Sport Mediaset via FCInterNews, Ardijan Ismajli and Sam Beukema top Beppe Marotta's wishlist. The post Inter Earmark Two Serie A Defenders to Replace Francesco Acerbi appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
